'''Makin''' was a [[Mon Calamari (language)/Legends|Mon Calamarian]] [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] serving the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. Makin was the commanding officer of the [[Third Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Third Fleet]]. Like Admiral [[Cha Niathal]], the [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]], Makin was known to be an aggressive warrior.

Makin commanded the Third Fleet task force at the [[Second Battle of Fondor]] and defected to Niathal's faction during the battle.

{{Char-stub}}
